---
title: "Resources"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.google-doc-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.google-doc-wrapper iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 5000px;
  border: none;
  overflow: hidden;
}
</style>

<div class="google-doc-wrapper">

<iframe
  src="https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vRayF4aRTDWBWrEOABiHEqaeqmW1k_c5NCQlf9s45p8zOtndKgpRXEDcT_GrirXffkslq-d4cwg5Yla/pub?embedded=true"
  scrolling="no">
</iframe>

</div>
```
